title: adenostemma lavenia var. viscosum
intro: Adenostemma lavenia var. viscosum, also known as sticky flower, is a plant species belonging to the Acanthaceae family. It is traditionally used in Southeast Asian folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Adenostemma lavenia var. viscosum include treating fever, diarrhea, and respiratory issues, as well as being used as a diuretic. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts for its medicinal uses, with some also using it in traditional remedies for its antiseptic and antifungal properties.
